features.description: Subagents in background sessions no longer bypass worktree-isolation guard, preventing shared checkout writes
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed subagents in background sessions bypassing the worktree-isolation guard and writing to the shared checkout

features.description: rm -rf $HOME now blocked as dangerous path even when HOME has trailing slash
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed `rm -rf $HOME` not being blocked as a dangerous path when `HOME` has a trailing slash

features.description: $TMPDIR now resolves consistently across sandboxed and unsandboxed Bash commands in same session
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed `$TMPDIR` resolving to different directories in sandboxed vs unsandboxed Bash commands within the same session

features.description: Auto-mode classifier improved at detecting data exfiltration, especially bulk repo content transfers
features.reference_changelog_line: Improved the auto-mode classifier's detection of data exfiltration, particularly bulk transfers of repository contents

features.description: Invalid allowedMcpServers/deniedMcpServers entry no longer discards entire managed-settings policy
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed a single invalid `allowedMcpServers`/`deniedMcpServers` entry in managed settings discarding all managed-settings policy; the bad entry is now dropped with a `claude doctor` warning

features.description: claude mcp list/get shows unapproved .mcp.json servers as Pending approval instead of auto-approving
features.reference_changelog_line: `claude mcp list`/`get` now show unapproved `.mcp.json` servers as `⏸ Pending approval` instead of auto-approving and connecting when output is piped

features.description: Lean system prompt now default for all models except Haiku, Sonnet, and Opus 4.7 and earlier
features.reference_changelog_line: The lean system prompt is now the default for all models except Haiku, Sonnet, and Opus 4.7 and earlier

features.description: /simplify now runs cleanup-only review instead of full /code-review --fix bug-hunting
features.reference_changelog_line: `/simplify` now runs a cleanup-only review (reuse, simplification, efficiency, altitude) and applies the fixes, instead of running the full `/code-review --fix` bug-hunting review

features.description: Streaming tool execution always enabled, including telemetry-disabled and Bedrock/Vertex/Foundry
features.reference_changelog_line: Streaming tool execution is now always enabled, including when telemetry is disabled or on Bedrock/Vertex/Foundry (previously behind a feature flag)

features.description: Claude reserves multiple-choice question prompt for decisions it genuinely cannot make itself
features.reference_changelog_line: Claude now reserves the multiple-choice question prompt for decisions it genuinely cannot make itself, instead of asking when it already has enough context to proceed

features.description: /workflows command launches dynamic workflows orchestrating tens to hundreds of background agents
features.reference_changelog_line: Introducing dynamic workflows: ask Claude to create a workflow and it orchestrates work across tens to hundreds of agents in the background, so you can take on larger, more complex tasks. Run `/workflows` to view your runs

features.description: claude agents: type ! <command> to run shell command as attachable background session, also via --bg --exec
features.reference_changelog_line: `claude agents`: type `! <command>` to run a shell command as a background session you can attach to and detach from. Also available as `claude --bg --exec '<command>'`

features.description: Opus 4.8 defaults to high effort; /effort xhigh available for hardest tasks
features.reference_changelog_line: Opus 4.8 is here! Now defaults to high effort · /effort xhigh for your hardest tasks

features.description: /chrome → Select browser… picks connected browser for Claude in Chrome actions
features.reference_changelog_line: Claude in Chrome: pick which connected browser to use via `/chrome` → "Select browser…", or in-chat when a browser action runs with multiple connected

features.description: CLAUDE_CODE_OPUS_4_6_FAST_MODE_OVERRIDE deprecated, removal on 06/01; use /model + /fast on instead
features.reference_changelog_line: Deprecated `CLAUDE_CODE_OPUS_4_6_FAST_MODE_OVERRIDE` (will be removed on 06/01). To use fast mode on Opus 4.6, switch with `/model claude-opus-4-6[1m]` and then `/fast on`

features.description: Plugins can declare defaultEnabled: false in plugin.json or marketplace entry, enable via /plugin
features.reference_changelog_line: Plugins can now declare `defaultEnabled: false` in `plugin.json` or a marketplace entry; enable them with `/plugin` or `claude plugin enable`. Dependencies of enabled plugins are still enabled automatically

features.description: Stdio MCP server subprocesses receive CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID and CLAUDECODE=1 in environment
features.reference_changelog_line: Stdio MCP server subprocesses now receive `CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID` and `CLAUDECODE=1` in their environment

features.description: /plugin Discover tab pins plugins matching current directory with suggested for this directory annotation
features.reference_changelog_line: The `/plugin` Discover tab now pins plugins whose relevance signals match the current directory with a "suggested for this directory" annotation

features.description: Custom API gateway no longer receives the user's Anthropic OAuth credential instead of its own token.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed a regression where a custom API gateway could receive the user's Anthropic OAuth credential instead of the gateway's own token

features.description: Subagent frontmatter MCP servers now honor --strict-mcp-config, --bare, remote mode, and managed allow/deny policies.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed subagent (Agent tool) frontmatter MCP servers ignoring `--strict-mcp-config`, `--bare`, remote mode, enterprise managed MCP config, and managed-settings MCP server allow/deny policies

features.description: --strict-mcp-config preserves inline mcpServers in explicit agent definitions and warns on blocked subagent MCP servers.
features.reference_changelog_line: `--strict-mcp-config` no longer strips inline `mcpServers` from explicitly-passed agent definitions (`--agents` / SDK `agents`), and blocked subagent MCP servers now surface a visible warning

features.description: Agent tool with subagent_type 'claude' no longer runs in a hidden worktree that silently discarded gitignored outputs.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed `Agent` tool with `subagent_type: 'claude'` running in an undocumented temporary worktree, which could silently discard outputs written to gitignored paths

features.description: /bg invoked mid-response now continues the response in the background session instead of dropping it.
features.reference_changelog_line: `/bg` while Claude is responding now continues the response in the background session instead of dropping it

features.description: Background sessions writing to $CLAUDE_JOB_DIR no longer trigger the sensitive-file permission prompt.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed background sessions writing temp files to `$CLAUDE_JOB_DIR` triggering a "sensitive file" permission prompt

features.description: /model now persists selection as the default for new sessions; press s to scope choice to current session only.
features.reference_changelog_line: `/model` now saves your selection as the default for new sessions (matching the IDE). Press `s` in the picker to switch models for the current session only.

features.description: macOS background agents now run as 'Claude Code' in Privacy & Security and retain permission grants across upgrades.
features.reference_changelog_line: macOS: background agents now appear as "Claude Code" in Privacy & Security and keep their permission grants across upgrades

features.description: modelPicker:setAsDefault keybinding is replaced by modelPicker:thisSessionOnly (action `d` becomes `s`).
features.reference_changelog_line: If you customized the `modelPicker:setAsDefault` keybinding, rename it to `modelPicker:thisSessionOnly` in keybindings.json (the `d` action was replaced by `s`)

features.description: skipLfs option for github/git plugin marketplace sources skips Git LFS downloads during clone and update.
features.reference_changelog_line: Added `skipLfs` option to `github`/`git` plugin marketplace sources to skip Git LFS downloads during clone and update

features.description: Status line commands now receive COLUMNS and LINES env vars so scripts can size output to the terminal width.
features.reference_changelog_line: Status line commands now receive `COLUMNS` and `LINES` environment variables so scripts can size output to the terminal width

features.description: claude agents dispatch input autocomplete now suggests native slash commands and bundled skills, not just project skills
features.reference_changelog_line: `claude agents`: autocomplete in the dispatch input now suggests native slash commands and bundled skills, not just project skills
